failure_signature: User asked to build a web component but did not use explicit UI/design keywords, so the frontend-design skill was not auto-loaded
remedy: frontend-design description could be broadened to trigger on 'build a component', 'create a page', 'make a form', not just explicit design/styling keywords.

failure_signature: User asked to fill out a PDF form but skill was not triggered because request used 'fill in' instead of 'populate' or 'create'
remedy: pdf skill description should include 'fill in form', 'complete PDF', 'add data to PDF' as trigger phrases alongside existing 'populate' keywords.

failure_signature: User asked to summarize a long conversation into structured notes but no summarization skill was loaded or triggered
remedy: A summarization/notes skill should trigger on keywords like 'summarize', 'key takeaways', 'action items', 'meeting notes'. Consider adding this skill.
